keyboard_arrow_down
Add column Claim_Difference = Claim_Amount - Approved_Amount



        

      


      

        
        

          subdirectory_arrow_right
          1 cell hidden
        

      

      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    

      

        

          
          

            
          

        

      
# check the columns are numeric
df['Claim_Amount'] = pd.to_numeric(df['Claim_Amount'], errors='coerce')
df['Approved_Amount'] = pd.to_numeric(df['Approved_Amount'], errors='coerce')
# then solve the problem
df['Claim_Difference'] = df['Claim_Amount'] - df['Approved_Amount']
df['Claim_Difference']

    
 
 

        

          

          
          Show hidden output
        

            
 

          

        

      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    
 

      

        

        

          
keyboard_arrow_down
Add column Treatment_Duration = Treatment_End_Date - Treatment_Start_Date.



        

      


      

        
        

          subdirectory_arrow_right
          1 cell hidden
        

      

      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    

      

        

          
          

            
          

        

      
# check the date columns are in datetime format
df['Treatment_Start_Date'] = pd.to_datetime(df['Treatment_Start_Date'])
df['Treatment_End_Date'] = pd.to_datetime(df['Treatment_End_Date'])
# then solve
df['Treatment_Duration'] = (df['Treatment_End_Date'] - df['Treatment_Start_Date']).dt.days
df['Treatment_Duration']

    
 
 

        

          

          
          Show hidden output
        

            
 

          

        

      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    
 

      

        

        

          
keyboard_arrow_down
Add column Policy_Duration = Policy_End_Date - Policy_Start_Date.



        

      


      

        
        

          subdirectory_arrow_right
          1 cell hidden
        

      

      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    

      

        

          
          

            
          

        

      
#check the date columns are in datetime format
df['Policy_Start_Date'] = pd.to_datetime(df['Policy_Start_Date'])
df['Policy_End_Date'] = pd.to_datetime(df['Policy_End_Date'])
#then solve
df['Policy_Duration'] = df['Policy_End_Date'] - df['Policy_Start_Date']
df['Policy_Duration']

    
 
 

        

          

          
          Show hidden output
        

            
 

          

        

      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    
 

      

        

        

          
keyboard_arrow_down
Create Age_Group(Child/Adult/Senior).



        

      


      

        
        

          subdirectory_arrow_right
          1 cell hidden
        

      

      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    

      

        

          
          

            
          

        

      
conditions = [(df['Age'] >= 0) & (df['Age'] <= 17), (df['Age'] >= 18) & (df['Age'] <= 64), (df['Age'] >= 65)]
choices = ['Child', 'Adult', 'Senior']
df['Age_Group'] = np.select(conditions, choices, default='Unknown')
df['Age_Group']

    
 
 

        

          

          
          Show hidden output
        

            
 

          

        

      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    
 

      

        

        

          
keyboard_arrow_down
Create Claim_Risk_Level based on Claim_Amount.



        

      


      

        
        

          subdirectory_arrow_right
          1 cell hidden
        

      

      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    

      

        

          
          

            
          

        

      
conditions = [(df['Claim_Amount'] >= 0) & (df['Claim_Amount'] <= 4999), (df['Claim_Amount'] >= 5000) & (df['Claim_Amount'] <= 9999), (df['Claim_Amount'] >= 10000) & (df['Claim_Amount'] <= 49999), (df['Claim_Amount'] >= 50000)]
choices = ['Low', 'Medium', 'High', 'Very High']
df['Claim_Risk_Level'] = np.select(conditions, choices, default='Unknown')
df['Claim_Risk_Level']

    
 
 

        

          

          
          Show hidden output
        

            
 

          

        

      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    
 

      

        

        

          
keyboard_arrow_down
Encode Gender numerically.



        

      


      

        
        

          subdirectory_arrow_right
          1 cell hidden
        

      

      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    

      

        

          
          

            
          

        

      
df['Gender'] = df['Gender'].map({'Male': 0, 'Female': 1})
df['Gender']

    
 
 

        

          

          
          Show hidden output
        

            
 

          

        

      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    
 

      

        

        

          
keyboard_arrow_down
Encode Claim_Status numerically.



        

      


      

        
        

          subdirectory_arrow_right
          1 cell hidden
        

      

      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    

      

        

          
          

            
          

        

      
df['Claim_Status'] = df['Claim_Status'].map({'Approved': 0, 'Pending': 1, 'Rejected': -1})
df['Claim_Status']

    
 
 

        

          

          
          Show hidden output
        

            
 

          

        

      

    

      spark
      Gemini

          add
          Code
        
        
          add
          Text

df['Country'] = df['Country'].str.title()
df['Country']

      Gemini

df.apply(lambda x: x.str.strip() if x.dtype == "object" else x)

keyboard_arrow_down
Find top 10 hospitals by total claim amount.



        

      


      

        
        

          subdirectory_arrow_right
          1 cell hidden
        

      

      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    

      

        

          
          

            
          

        

      
df = df.groupby('Hospital_Name')['Claim_Amount'].sum().sort_values(ascending=False).head(10)
df

    
 
 

        

          

          
          Show hidden output
        

            
 

          

        

      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    
 

      

        

        

          
keyboard_arrow_down
Find top 10 Patients by total claim amount.



        

      


      

        
        

          subdirectory_arrow_right
          1 cell hidden
        

      

      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    

      

        

          
          

            
          

        

      
df = df.groupby('Patient_ID')['Claim_Amount'].sum().sort_values(ascending=False).head(10)
df

    
 
 

        

          

          
          Show hidden output
        

            
 

          

        

      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    
 

      

        

        

          
keyboard_arrow_down
Calculate average Claim_Amount by Disease_Category.



        

      


      

        
        

          subdirectory_arrow_right
          1 cell hidden
        

      

      

        
          add
          Code
        
        
          add
          Text
        
        
        
      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    

      

        

          
          

            
          

        

      
df = df.groupby('Disease_Category')['Claim_Amount'].mean()
df

    
 
 

        

          

          
          Show hidden output
        

            
 

          

        

      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    
 

      

        

        

          
keyboard_arrow_down
Calculate average Approved_Amount per Insurance_Type.



        

      


      

        
        

          subdirectory_arrow_right
          1 cell hidden
        

      

      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    

      

        

          
          

            
          

        

      
df = df.groupby('Insurance_Type')['Approved_Amount'].mean()
df

    
 
 

        

          

          
          Show hidden output
        

            
 

          

        

      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    
 

      

        

        

          
keyboard_arrow_down
Identify the most common Insurance_Type.



        

      


      

        
        

          subdirectory_arrow_right
          1 cell hidden
        

      

      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    

      

        

          
          

            
          

        

      
df['most_common_insurance'] = df['Insurance_Type'].value_counts().idxmax()
df['most_common_insurance']

    
 
 

        

          

          
          Show hidden output
        

            
 

          

        

      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    
 

      

        

        

          
keyboard_arrow_down
Find patient with hishest Claim_Difference.



        

      


      

        
        

          subdirectory_arrow_right
          1 cell hidden
        

      

      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    

      

        

          
          

            
          

        

      
df['Highest_Claim_difference'] = df.groupby('Patient_ID')['Claim_Amount'].sum().idxmax()
df['Highest_Claim_difference']

    
 
 

        

          

          
          Show hidden output
        

            
 

          

        

      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    
 

      

        

        

          
keyboard_arrow_down
Identify patients with more than 3 claims.



        

      


      

        
        

          subdirectory_arrow_right
          1 cell hidden
        

      

      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    

      

        

          
          

            
          

        

      
claim_counts = df.groupby('Patient_ID').size()
patients_morethan_3 = claim_counts[claim_counts > 3]
patients_morethan_3

    
 
 

        

          

          
          Show hidden output
        

            
 

          

        

      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    
 

      

        

        

          
keyboard_arrow_down
Sort claims by Claim_Difference descending.



        

      


      

        
        

          subdirectory_arrow_right
          1 cell hidden
        

      

      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    

      

        

          
          

            
          

        

      
df = df.sort_values(by='Claim_Amount', ascending=False)
df

    
 
 

        

          

          
          Show hidden output
        

            
 

          

        

      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    
 

      

        

        

          
keyboard_arrow_down
Group claims by Country and Insurance_Type and calculate total Claim_Amount.



        

      


      

        
        

          subdirectory_arrow_right
          1 cell hidden
        

      

      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    

      

        

          
          

            
          

        

      
df = df.groupby(['Country', 'Insurance_Type'])['Claim_Amount'].sum()
df

      Gemini
    
 

      

        

        

          
keyboard_arrow_down
Validate that Approved_Amount <= Claim_Amount.



        

      


      

        
        

          subdirectory_arrow_right
          1 cell hidden
        

      

      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    

      

        

          
          

            
          

        

      
df = df[df['Approved_Amount'] <= df['Claim_Amount']]
df

    
 
 

        

          

          
          Show hidden output
        

            
 

          

        

      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    
 

      

        

        

          
keyboard_arrow_down
Validate that policy_Duration > 0.



        

      


      

        
        

          subdirectory_arrow_right
          1 cell hidden
        

      

      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    

      

        

          
          

            
          

        

      
df['Policy_Start_Date'] = pd.to_datetime(df['Policy_Start_Date'])
df['Policy_End_Date'] = pd.to_datetime(df['Policy_End_Date'])
#then solve
df['Policy_Duration'] = (df['Policy_End_Date'] - df['Policy_Start_Date']).dt.days
df_Duration = df[df['Policy_Duration'] > 0]
df_Duration

    
 
 

        

          

          
          Show hidden output
        

            
 

          

        

      

    

      spark
      Gemini

          subdirectory_arrow_right

      spark
      Gemini
    

      

        

          
          

            
          

        

      
df['Treatment_Start_Date'] = pd.to_datetime(df['Treatment_Start_Date'])
df['Treatment_End_Date'] = pd.to_datetime(df['Treatment_End_Date'])
#then solve
df['Treatment_Duration'] = (df['Treatment_End_Date'] - df['Treatment_Start_Date']).dt.days
df['Treatment_Duration']

keyboard_arrow_down
Identify mismatched Age and Disease_Category (e.g.,"Child" with "Alzheimer").



        

      


      

        
        

          subdirectory_arrow_right
          1 cell hidden
        

      

      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    

      

        

          
          

            
          

        

      
mismatched_records = df[((df['Age'] < 18) & (df['Disease_Category'] == 'Acute')) | ((df['Age'] < 18) & (df['Disease_Category'] == 'Chronic')) | ((df['Age'] >= 60) & (df['Disease_Category'] == 'Infectious'))]
mismatched_records

    
 
 

        

          

          
          Show hidden output
        

            
 

          

        

      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    
 

      

        

        

          
keyboard_arrow_down
Check for invalid phone numbers.



        

      


      

        
        

          subdirectory_arrow_right
          1 cell hidden
        

      

      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    

      

        

          
          

            
          

        

      
# Remove non-digit characters
df['Phone_Clean'] = df['Phone'].astype(str).str.replace(r'\D', '', regex=True)
# Identify invalid phone numbers (not exactly 10 digits)
df['Invalid_Phone'] = df['Phone_Clean'].str.len() != 10
# Get invalid records
invalid_phones = df[df['Invalid_Phone']]
invalid_phones

    
 
 

        

          

          
          Show hidden output
        

            
 

          

        

      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    
 

      

        

        

          
keyboard_arrow_down
Convert date columns to datetime format.



        

      


      

        
        

          subdirectory_arrow_right
          1 cell hidden
        

      

      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    

      

        

          
          

            
          

        

      
df = df.apply(lambda col: pd.to_datetime(col, errors='ignore'))
df

    
 
 

        

          

          
          Show hidden output
        

            
 

          

        

      

    

      spark
      Gemini

          subdirectory_arrow_right

df['Email'] = df['Email'].str.strip()
df['Address'] = df['Address'].str.strip()
df

Standardize Doctor_Name capitalization.



        

      


      

        
        

          subdirectory_arrow_right
          1 cell hidden
        

      

      

    

      spark
      Gemini
    

      

        

          
          

            
          

        

      
#df['Doctor_Name'] = df['Doctor_Name'].str.lower()
#str.strip() → removes extra spaces
#str.title() → converts to Proper Case
#df['Doctor_Name'] = df['Doctor_Name'].str.strip()

df['Doctor_Name'] = df['Doctor_Name'].str.upper()
df['Doctor_Name']

df['Invalid_CoPay'] = df['CoPay_Percentage'] <= 100
df['Invalid_CoPay']

      Gemini

          subdirectory_arrow_right

      spark
      Gemini
    

      

        

          
          

            
          

        

      
df['Missing_Payment_Status'] = ((df['Claim_Status'] == 'Completed') & (df['Payment_Status'].isna()))
df['Missing_Payment_Status']

df = pd.read_csv('/content/medical_insurance_uncleaned.csv')
df
